=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/effectFnIife_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("preview") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)


==== /.src/effectFnIife_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics effectFnIife:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.fn("preview")(function*() {
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    })()
    ~~~~
!!! warning TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("preview") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
